+    The checks below mirror the five GitHub Actions workflows one-for-one, so

+# --- 5. Script bench compile (mirrors bench.yml) ---------------------------
+# Compile-only: --no-run builds the bench harnesses without executing them,
+# matching the bench.yml job which only verifies that benchmarks still build.
+Invoke-Step -Label 'cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run' -Exe 'cargo' `
+    -Arguments @('bench', '-p', 'rge-script-bench', '--no-run')
+
 Write-Output ''

 exit 0

@@ -0,0 +1,114 @@
+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-102
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-23_08-59-13+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1
+- .github/workflows/fmt.yml
+- .github/workflows/architecture.yml
+- .github/workflows/deny.yml
+- .github/workflows/tests.yml
+- .github/workflows/bench.yml
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-102_EXEC_*.md
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Implement GitHub issue #102 by adding bench workflow parity to the local AI dispatch verification gate. `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` currently states that it mirrors four GitHub Actions workflows and omits `.github/workflows/bench.yml`; the Executor must make the smallest additive script change so the gate also compile-checks the `rge-script-bench` benchmarks before branch-mode publish.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1`
+
+### MUST NOT edit
+- `.github/workflows/**`
+- `Cargo.toml`
+- `Cargo.lock`
+- Any Rust source file.
+- Any test file.
+- Any documentation file.
+- Any status file, schema, script other than `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1`, gitignore file, lint configuration, workflow configuration, dependency configuration, or repository metadata file.
+- Any existing handoff packet, including this TASK packet.
+- Any handoff packet other than the single required `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-102_EXEC_*.md` execution report.
+
+### MAY add new files
+- Exactly one execution report matching `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-102_EXEC_*.md`.
+
+### MUST NOT add new files
+- New source files, tests, docs, fixtures, generated artifacts, persisted logs, screenshots, Cargo entries, dependency files, crates, architecture lints, schemas, scripts, workflow files, TASK packets, REVIEW packets, CORRECT packets, or CLOSEOUT packets.
+
+## Deliverables
+
+- A minimal additive edit to `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` that adds exactly one new `Invoke-Step` invocation for `cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run`.
+- The script header/docstring updated from "four GitHub Actions workflows" to "five GitHub Actions workflows" and updated to enumerate `.github/workflows/bench.yml` alongside `.github/workflows/fmt.yml`, `.github/workflows/architecture.yml`, `.github/workflows/deny.yml`, and `.github/workflows/tests.yml`.
+- One `EXECUTION_REPORT` packet under `ai_handoffs/` documenting the exact diff, verification results, and whether the branch-mode publish gate is ready.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` contains exactly one added `Invoke-Step` invocation whose command is `cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run`.
+- The new bench step is not conditional, skipped, hidden behind a feature flag, or implemented through a new helper that bypasses `Invoke-Step`.
+- The header/docstring says the checks mirror five GitHub Actions workflows and includes `.github/workflows/bench.yml` with the bench compile command.
+- Existing verification steps for fmt, architecture lints, cargo-deny, workspace tests, and doctests remain present and keep their existing command options unless a direct line movement is needed to place the new bench section clearly.
+- No new dependency is added, and neither `Cargo.toml` nor `Cargo.lock` is modified.
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` exits 0 end-to-end after the edit.
+- The final repository diff is limited to `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` plus this dispatch's single `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-102_EXEC_*.md` packet.
+- The execution report footer contains exactly one line-anchored `HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE` marker and routes `NEXT_ROLE: REVIEWER_AI` when all gates pass.
+
+## Constraints / Non-Goals
+
+- Keep the implementation additive and scoped to local verification parity with `bench.yml`.
+- Keep this dispatch in branch publish mode. Do not commit, push, merge, open a PR, add a GitHub issue comment, or alter queue-runner publish policy.
+- Do not fix benchmark target compile failures, Rust source failures, dependency issues, Cargo metadata, CI configuration, or workflow behavior in this dispatch.
+- Do not modify `bench.yml`; use it only as the source of the command that must be mirrored locally.
+- Do not add retries, caching, environment setup, toolchain installation, dependency installation, or platform-specific workarounds.
+- Do not broaden the script into a general CI runner or refactor unrelated verification logic.
+
+## Verification Gates
+
+The Executor MUST run and document the result of each of these in their
+`EXECUTION_REPORT`:
+
+- `git status --short --untracked-files=no` before editing, expected no tracked changes outside any already-approved dispatch context. If unexpected tracked changes exist, document them and halt rather than cleaning or reverting them.
+- Read `.github/workflows/bench.yml` and `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` before editing.
+- After editing, inspect `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` and confirm there is exactly one new `Invoke-Step` for `cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run`.
+- Run `.\\.ai\\dispatch.verify.ps1`, expected exit 0 end-to-end.
+- Run `git diff -- .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` and document that the diff is limited to the docstring/header update plus the single new bench `Invoke-Step`.
+- Run `git status --short` after writing the EXEC packet, expected changes limited to `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` and the single `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-102_EXEC_*.md` report.
+
+## Halt Conditions
+
+The Executor MUST halt (without committing) and request fresh guidance if any
+of the following occur:
+
+- The newly added `cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run` step fails locally. In this case, do not attempt to fix bench-target breakage; write the EXEC report with header `STATUS: NEEDS_HUMAN`, footer `HANDOFF_STATUS: NEEDS_HUMAN`, and `NEXT_ROLE: HUMAN_ARBITER`.
+- Any other step in `.\\.ai\\dispatch.verify.ps1` fails after the additive edit. Document the failing step and halt instead of expanding scope.
+- Adding the bench check appears to require editing `Cargo.toml`, `Cargo.lock`, Rust source, tests, workflow files, dependencies, or any file outside `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1`.
+- More than one new `Invoke-Step` invocation would be needed to mirror `bench.yml`.
+- The script cannot be updated without changing existing fmt, architecture, deny, test, or doctest command semantics.
+- The working tree shows unexpected tracked changes outside `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` and this dispatch's own EXEC packet.
+
+## Planner Notes
+
